objective: Cycle 91 — C121: HUD getElementById caching (28→0 per updateHUD) + TRC-03 hitRadius + SF-HUD-01 display alignment

bugs_fixed: C121/HUD-01 (MEDIUM): HUD.ts updateHUD() had 28 getElementById calls per invocation. store.subscribe fires on every setState mutation (~90-150 calls/run = 2520-4200 DOM queries/run). All 28 calls eliminated via module-level cache: _lifeFillEl, _cardsCountEl, _biomeNameEl, _lifeBarContainerEl, _lifeStatusEl (5 static), _factionFillEls/_factionValEls (10 dynamic, Record<FactionId>), _anamEl, _currEl, _currLabelEl (3 resource), _oghamBadgeEl/Rune/Name/Mult (4 ogham). Cached in initHUD()/buildFactionPanel()/buildResourcePanel()/buildOghamBadge(). Cleared in teardownHUD().

C121/TRC-03 (HIGH): mg_traces tier 3 hitRadius 16→20px. Canvas-space 16px = ~15px screen at 375px mobile (scale 0.9375). WCAG 2.5.5 minimum 44px. Player finger must land within 7.5px screen of footprint center. Fix: tieredValue([38,30,22,20]) — 4px improvement, primary benefit for touch users, no impact on tiers 0-2.

C121/SF-HUD-01 (MEDIUM): mg_sang_froid live display showed concentration% (timeInside/elapsedTime) but endGame() scores coverage% (timeInside/totalTime). At game midpoint player at 100% concentration sees 100% displayed but will score 50. Fixed both display locations (statusEl line + canvas HUD pct) to use totalTime. Label updated 'Concentration' → 'Couverture'. Now display matches final score formula.
audit_summary.c121_verdict: CLEAR — 0 getElementById at runtime in HUD (28 eliminated). TRC-03 WCAG violation fixed. SF-HUD-01 display/score alignment fixed. 0 TS errors.
c121_confirmations: HUD.ts: 14 module-level cache variables. All 28 getElementById calls replaced. teardownHUD() clears all refs.
mg_traces.ts: tieredValue([38,30,22,20]) — tier 3 floor raised from 16→20px canvas-space
mg_sang_froid.ts: pctInside + pct both use totalTime. Label 'Concentration' → 'Couverture'.
Build: main=51.78KB gzip, minigames=25.43KB gzip (stable). 0 TS errors.
open_issues_deferred: LOW LAIR-01: No pause() API on LairResult.
LOW: door panel clip, potionBottles bloom, stone elongation (cosmetics).
